user_prompt: I need two right triangles side by side to help me follow a proof of the Hypotenuse-Leg theorem. Mark the right angles at C and F with squares, mark the equal hypotenuses with one tick mark each, and mark the equal legs AC and DF with double tick marks. Label all six vertices.
